batch_summary.note: S-001: stop-texting performative pattern Nov 17-18 2024 (ROW-7627). Says stop, then sends 7+ messages immediately. ARC-RF12-002 promotes to WATCHING at Signal 1.

messages.text: Stop texting me unless something is wrong
She tries this at home and I tell her that if she doesn't eat the dinner then she can't have anything else the rest of the night
It's the same thing except I don't text you every time it happens
Instead I parent her and handle it
She is at your house. You should be able to parent

primary_flags.classification: RF-12 primary Sev-1 — Stop-texting performative pattern (ADD-006): Melissa says 'Stop texting me unless something is wrong' (ROW-7627), then immediately continues texting with 7+ messages about the same parenting topic (ROW-7630 through 7645). The 'stop texting' demand followed by continued texting creates false documentation: it appears in the record that Eli was texting despite her request, when in fact she initiated multiple messages after the demand. Eli responding to her subsequent messages (ROW-7628/7629) is then framed as continued contact after her stated request. ARC-RF12-002 Signal 1. ARC-RF12-002 promotes to WATCHING.
primary_flags.addendum_applied: ADD-006 (stop texting me — performative boundary manufacture for court documentation). ADD-002 (Eli's responses are not RF-12; the manufactured context is the signal).
